hypertrophy.reasoning: Address pulling patterns and posterior chain neglected by pressing/leg-focused strength work while CNS recovers.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Overhead Squat, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Power Snatch, 3 by 3. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 200m Run, 7 Full Snatches, 1 Rope Climb. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
